title: CUDA kernel for ggml_dsv4_hc_expand (V4 CUDA port Stream B4)

history.note: Plan + spec pre-written and pre-fixed with Stream A lessons (-b CPU,CUDA, count assertion). Stream A merged; B4 unblocked. Note: block_out is 2D per ggml.c:6363-6366 (NOT 3D); plan correctly uses this shape.

REQUEST_CHANGES: plan misindexed block_out as 3D (nb_b2 + i_hc * nb_b1). Eight specific file:line issues identified. Plan v2 fixes: 2D shape doc, nb_b0/nb_b1 only in signature, math + comments updated, dispatch passes nb[0]/nb[1] only, agent spec line 19 corrected.
APPROVE: block_out 2D throughout, stride layouts match ggml-cpu/ops.cpp:11218-11231, -b CPU,CUDA + COUNT>=3 still present.

Implemented: dsv4-hc-expand.{cuh,cu} created. ggml-cuda.cu updated with include (alphabetic), dispatcher case, supports_op (F32 op + all 4 srcs). CMakeLists not modified (ggml-cuda GLOBs *.cu/*.cuh). Commit c71890413.

APPROVE: block_out treated as 2D throughout; no nb_b2 in signature or launch; kernel indexing matches CPU math; launch uses total=n_embd*n_hc*n_tokens; CUDA_CHECK present; dispatch + supports_op correct.

BLOCKED: CUDA gate cannot run from darwin/arm64 orchestrator (no nvcc). Required: run on RTX 6000 Ada / 5090 host: cmake -B build-cuda -DGGML_CUDA=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES="89;120" && cmake --build build-cuda -j --target test-backend-ops && ./build-cuda/bin/test-backend-ops -b CPU,CUDA -o DSV4_HC_EXPAND. Expected COUNT >= 3. Implementation pushed to `mine` for preservation; transition to done/ awaits gate pass on CUDA host.
